description: Recurring daily builder generates the expected cron string from a selected time.
Recurring weekly builder requires at least one weekday before save.
Recurring weekly builder generates the expected cron string for multiple selected weekdays and a selected time.
Recurring monthly builder requires a valid day-of-month before save.
Recurring monthly builder generates the expected cron string for the selected day-of-month and time.
Editing a supported daily cron hydrates the recurrence builder with the correct frequency and time.
Editing a supported weekly cron hydrates the recurrence builder with the correct weekdays and time.
Editing a supported monthly cron hydrates the recurrence builder with the correct day-of-month and time.
An unsupported saved cron expression opens in advanced mode with the raw cron value preserved.
Advanced cron mode allows users to edit and save the raw cron string directly.
The schedule summary text updates to reflect supported daily recurrence selections.
The schedule summary text updates to reflect supported weekly recurrence selections.
The schedule summary text updates to reflect supported monthly recurrence selections.
One-time schedule mode remains unchanged and does not render the recurring builder controls.
